name: lynrummy-ts
description: TypeScript port of the Lyn Rummy BFS solver. Sibling to the python/ and elm/ subtrees; consumes the same DSL conformance fixtures.

scripts.test: node test/test_conformance_leaf.ts && node test/test_engine_conformance.ts && node test/test_verb_to_primitives.ts && node test/test_replay_walkthroughs.ts
